film.title: Little Fockers
film.overview: It has taken 10 years, two little Fockers with wife Pam and countless hurdles for Greg to finally get in with his tightly wound father-in-law, Jack. After the cash-strapped dad takes a job moonlighting for a drug company, Jack's suspicions about his favorite male nurse come roaring back. When Greg and Pam's entire clan descends for the twins' birthday party, Greg must prove to the skeptical Jack that he's fully capable as the man of the house.

dialogues.dialogue: You dress up a little nicer. You meet at a hotel.  You role play.  There is absolutely no shame in playing  out a fantasy, but with each other.  All right?
Wow, sweetheart. Very impressive.  She's lethal. She is a ninja.  Proud of her.  Now, Henry, you're going to drink your milk, aren't you?  You want to hit the same growth spurt as your sister.
- Oh. No, no. - Really?  No. I mean, I'm not gay myself, but if I were gay,  I would certainly be proud to choose  a life partner like Gay Focker.  And that's his actual name.
dialogues.cause_raw: choosing a life partner like Gay Focker
